limitations: Candidate only; the live ValuCast Prospects board is not switched by this artifact.
DD feed rows provide the current review universe and card context, not score inputs.
Identity-only fallback rows remain for prospects absent from the current ValuCast layer.
Identity-only fallback rows have verified MLBAM identity but no eligible ValuCast model sample yet.
Fallback-only lower-minors profiles are capped until the expanded model earns publication-grade evidence.

promotion.reason: Prospect Rank v1 is a candidate shadow artifact; no public consumer is allowed yet.

rank_contract.dd_feed_usage: Universe, identity, and display context only.
rank_contract.purpose: Review a ValuCast-owned prospect ordering before it is allowed to influence any public ValuCast or DD surface.
rank_contract.tie_policy: Ranks are contiguous after deterministic non-score tiebreakers.
